biography.q1: Who are you, where are you from, and what do you currently do?
biography.q2: How did your interest in programming start, and what hooked you at first?
biography.q3: What were your first projects or experiments, and what did you learn from them?
biography.q4: Which technologies or frameworks do you use today, and why do you choose them?
biography.q5: Which personal or professional achievements have marked you the most so far?
biography.q6: What kinds of problems do you enjoy solving, and in which areas do you want to grow?
biography.q7: What is your way of working like (teamwork, leadership, product, execution)?
biography.q8: What are you building now, and what is your next goal?

products.loading: Loading projects in production or in productive deploy process

santandev.title: A/B Talk - SantanDev (2022)
santandev.description: Talk presented at SantanDev, the event for developers organized by Santander in 2022. I explained how A/B experiments work in web development and in real production systems.

jodalok.title: Dale Aceptar (2013)
jodalok.description: Gameplay of "JodaloK", a game built in Alice for Dale Aceptar 2013, a programming contest by Nación and Fundación Sadosky. I won first place in the advanced individual category during my last year of high school.
